PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN OF PERSON, CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2020 - HEARING HELD. THE COURT EXTENDED THE TEMPORARY GUARDIANSHIPS OF ANAYA SMITH, AZIA SMITH, AND ELAYSHA SMITH TO JANUARY 20, 2021 (ORDERS SIGNED) TO ALLOW TIME FOR THE TEMPORARY GUARDIAN TO INITIATE GUARDIANSHIP PROCEEDINGS FOR ALL THREE MINORS IN SACRAMENTO COUNTY. THE COURT THEN GRANTED THE PETITION TO TRANSFER THE MATTER TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY (ORDER SIGNED). -
